default.description: Natural Language Processing (NLP) lab programs and solutions for SPPU students. Learn text preprocessing techniques including tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, stopword removal, and POS tagging using NLTK and spaCy. Implement regular expressions for pattern matching, text analysis, and document processing. Complete Python implementations with detailed explanations for text mining and linguistic analysis.

questions.question: To perform various preprocessing tasks in NLP: Perform various basic pre-processing tasks like tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, stopword removal etc. using inbuilt functions and using regular expressions.
questions.title: NLP Text Preprocessing
